completed_tasks.name: Added 4 backlog items (detail modal, bulk editor, fabric hierarchy, supplies tab)

remaining_tasks.name: Filter brand dropdown in supply form modal by active tab supply type
Add edit affordance (hover icon/effect) to supply grid tiles
Fix fabric size calculation — uses stitch counts as inches instead of dividing by fabric count
Fix shopping list project link 404 — projectId vs chart id mismatch
Change 'Got' label to 'Have' in project supplies tab
Human UAT re-test after bug fixes

human_actions_pending.action: Re-test all 7 UAT areas after bug fixes are applied
human_actions_pending.context: Initial UAT found 8 issues, 2 deferred to backlog, 6 bugs to fix

decisions.decision: Cherry-picked worktree commits instead of merging branches
decisions.rationale: Worktree merge had fast-forward detection issues

decisions.decision: Fixed React 19 ESLint violations with idiomatic patterns
decisions.rationale: Lazy initializer for localStorage, key-based remount for form reset

decisions.decision: Prisma findMany crash was stale globalThis singleton, not schema drift
decisions.rationale: Dev server restart fixed it — no code change needed

decisions.decision: Supply detail modal deferred to post-MVP (backlog 999.1)
decisions.rationale: Edit-first is fine for MVP; detail view adds value once supplies are linked to real projects

decisions.decision: Bulk supply editor deferred to post-MVP (backlog 999.2)
decisions.rationale: One-at-a-time management works for MVP; bulk editing matters for 50+ thread kitting

decisions.decision: Fabric type hierarchy deferred to post-MVP (backlog 999.3)
decisions.rationale: Flat dropdown with Jobelan added covers MVP; hierarchy matters once collection grows

decisions.decision: Project supplies tab layout deferred to post-MVP (backlog 999.4)
decisions.rationale: Inline display works for MVP; tabs become valuable when sessions are added in Milestone 3

next_action: Fix 6 UAT bugs (brand nav, brand filter, grid hover, fabric calc, project link 404, Got→Have label), then run post-execution gates (code review, verification, UAT re-test)
context_notes: All 7 plans executed and working. First UAT pass found 8 issues: 2 deferred to backlog, 6 bugs to fix. The Prisma crash was a stale singleton (dev server restart fixed it, no code change). Bug details are well-documented in .continue-here.md with file paths and line numbers from the Explore agent investigation.
